title: QAOA for Combinatorial Optimization
description: Apply the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm to combinatorial optimization problems including Max-Cut, portfolio optimization, and constraint satisfaction, with focus on problem encoding, mixer design, and parameter optimization strategies.
learningObjectives: Encode combinatorial optimization problems as quantum Hamiltonians
Design appropriate mixer operators for different problem structures
Implement parameter optimization strategies for QAOA
Apply QAOA to Max-Cut and portfolio optimization problems
Analyze QAOA performance and approximation ratios
